CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.Name = 'SaaS', IF( OR( ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Onboarding_Attempt_Status_New__c, "Canceled") ), SaaS_Tracking_Attennd_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, IF( NOT(ISBLANK(SaaS_Tracking_Attennd_Stage_Met_Stamp__c)), SaaS_Tracking_Attennd_Stage_Met_Stamp__c, DATEVALUE(Account__r.School_Object__r.SaaS_Tracking_Attendance_Stage_Met_Date__c) ) ), NULL )
CustomField.label: SaaS Tracking Attendance Stage Met Date
